tasks.label: Build GUI (JavaFX)
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $ProjectRoot = if (Test-Path 'SkillTracker/src') { 'SkillTracker' } elseif (Test-Path 'src') { '.' } else { throw 'Could not find src directory.' }; Set-Location $ProjectRoot; $JDK = if ($env:JDK_FX_HOME) { $env:JDK_FX_HOME } elseif (Test-Path 'C:/Program Files/Zulu/zulu-17') { 'C:/Program Files/Zulu/zulu-17' } else { throw 'Install Azul ZuluFX JDK 17 or set JDK_FX_HOME.' }; $sources = Get-ChildItem -Path src -Filter '*.java' -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; & "$JDK/bin/javac.exe" -encoding UTF-8 --add-modules javafx.controls,javafx.graphics -cp 'lib/mysql-connector-j-8.0.33.jar;.' -d out $sources

tasks.label: Run GUI LoginApp (JavaFX)
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $ProjectRoot = if (Test-Path 'SkillTracker/src') { 'SkillTracker' } elseif (Test-Path 'src') { '.' } else { throw 'Could not find src directory.' }; Set-Location $ProjectRoot; $JDK = if ($env:JDK_FX_HOME) { $env:JDK_FX_HOME } elseif (Test-Path 'C:/Program Files/Zulu/zulu-17') { 'C:/Program Files/Zulu/zulu-17' } else { throw 'Install Azul ZuluFX JDK 17 or set JDK_FX_HOME.' }; & "$JDK/bin/java.exe" --add-modules javafx.controls,javafx.graphics -cp 'out;lib/mysql-connector-j-8.0.33.jar' gui.LoginApp

tasks.label: Build Core (No GUI)
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $ProjectRoot = if (Test-Path 'SkillTracker/src') { 'SkillTracker' } elseif (Test-Path 'src') { '.' } else { throw 'Could not find src directory.' }; Set-Location $ProjectRoot; $sources = Get-ChildItem -Path src -Filter '*.java' -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\src\\gui\\' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; javac -encoding UTF-8 -cp 'lib/mysql-connector-j-8.0.33.jar;.' -d out $sources

tasks.label: Run Core LoginFlowTestRunner
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $ProjectRoot = if (Test-Path 'SkillTracker/src') { 'SkillTracker' } elseif (Test-Path 'src') { '.' } else { throw 'Could not find src directory.' }; Set-Location $ProjectRoot; java -cp 'out;lib/mysql-connector-j-8.0.33.jar' LoginFlowTestRunner
